message:
chore(beads): close 43 stale fnp-python wrapper-parity beads

Closes 43 P2 wrapper-parity beads whose numpy passthrough wrappers +
oracle tests were delivered in commits that already landed today but
where the bead status was never flipped from open → closed.

Cross-referenced by matching open-bead IDs against `br-franken_numpy-<id>`
markers in commit messages (git log --all --grep). Every closure links
back to the exact commit SHA that delivered the wrapper.

Beads closed (commit: beads):
- 4ebccc8: 0zp4 1zvx fzsm (hamming, blackman, hanning window wrappers)
- 460e6e6: u5ry xtfk (triu, kaiser)
- 1dbdc09: 1w2y fqha (linalg.eig, polyfit)
- 27c2154: vpnc xuzx (linalg.vecdot, linalg.matrix_norm)
- 1c9e95b: np8j 7knr (ma.argmax, ma.argmin)
- c7be0f2: j2vb kl5f 9iw4 2vc8 n7pr (recfunctions.{drop,rename,append}_fields,
                                     merge_arrays, unstructured_to_structured)
- 764eab0: 5ecm lgpi 8ymv ak21 s0ma ls11 (testing.assert_{equal,almost_equal,
                                           array_almost_equal,array_less,
                                           approx_equal,string_equal})
- 3b1b86c: 3gi3 45j3 2rfa znfq tcit (roots, poly, require, mask_indices,
                                     einsum_path)
- 91294a4: 9rdu 3di4 (asarray_chkfinite, common_type)
- 89da9a6: 7asp 43nw (real, imag)
- 4499e8c: 82ch (negative) + 29r9 (fabs)
- a68c4b2: 8c71 (deg2rad)
- b026638: 5ria (log1p)
- 764f448: odmz qd84 z0wa v6i5 jymg (rad2deg, positive, reciprocal,
                                     conjugate, fmod)
- d9b632e: drwc dy0w 6oei (floor_divide, invert, unwrap)
- 84f4b05: 1nqd (fromiter)
- e2368ea: b5ls (frombuffer)
- fe94481: 3vkj (fromstring)
- 8e55b7a: 4gxm (broadcast_shapes)
- 15c6698: 9vzr b2hx 5wra (partition, argpartition, fromfile)
- a86578c: 7mzs 9huf (loadtxt, genfromtxt)

Open beads now: 113 → 60.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
